steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to "specify which countries the Danube River passes through." The notes list two countries: Hungary and Romania. Any correct choice must include both.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — The second longest river in Europe, the Danube River passes through both Hungary and Romania.: names both countries directly. ✓
  • Choice B — The Danube River is not the longest river in the world.: discusses world rank, not countries. ✗
  • Choice C — At 2,888 kilometers long, the Danube River is the second longest river in Europe.: gives length and European rank, not countries. ✗
  • Choice D — Among the longest rivers in the world, the Danube River ranks No. 30.: gives world rank, not countries. ✗
That is the correct answer.
